'''Jo-Mau-Rinti''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|racer]] who served as a member of [[Team NaKuda]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. He perished in a massive explosion which killed nearly 200,000 swoop race spectators by an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]].
